"Synergy" between economics and social science:
First you should notice that the "SOSC" course code is a hybrid of many subjects, so you can study whatever you want and still fulfill the minor requirement. 2 of the common core SOSC courses also count as minor fulfillments so it is easy.

If you want to beef up your economics expertise, your choice depends on which field you want to do.
If you want to do behavioral econ, you should take some psychology courses though it is really lacking in ust.
If you want to do developmental, then take the economic development courses in sosc, but notice that most courses in that spectrum focus on China.
If you want to do political economy(it is classified as political science though), there are two courses related to it, the globalization one and the china and political economy one. there is also a PG course on IPE, but you will need instructor's consent to take the course.

I recommend you guys to do the PG versions of the courses so that you can learn some, but don't stress yourself to learn too much as it is already so stressful in ust. cheers.

When the Amber or Red Rainstorm Warning or Typhoon Signal No. 1 or 3 is in effect, all scheduled classes and examinations will be held as usual.

At or before 12 noon, classes and examinations starting at or after 2 pm will be held as scheduled, while classes and examinations starting before 2 pm will be cancelled.

At or before 4 pm, classes and examinations starting at or after 6 pm will be held as scheduled, while classes and examinations starting before 6 pm will be cancelled.

我在這裡出了很多很多post, 但70%都是所謂的 "假膠post", 即是完完全全亂up老作搏大家一笑, 帖內的內容和自己的事完全沒關, 無論出post同reply都係, 甚至好多時同真實既自己係相反

明明自己愛好ust, 卻經常出post揶揄爛grade
明明自己都係工程界人士, 卻經常出post話cu engine一文不值
明明自己極討厭某個professor, 就出post話自己愛上左佢
歸根究抵都係純粹因為讀書時無聊, 所以無無聊聊地出個post 講無聊野
然後一邊做assignment, 一邊睇回覆, 自娛一下
這件事對不喜歡現在溫書的我十分重要

同時, 我故意講相反野, 因為驚俾人知我既真正身份
一個知...就會話俾另一個知, 然後一傳十, 十傳百, 就不好了, 我完全唔想俾人知我o係網上既身份, 講過 d 乜 俾人知道, 我o係呢度暢所欲言, 說傻話, 減減壓的空間就完全被破壞了...
(雖然我出既post都同自己做過既野無關)

不過, 有一日我忽然發現自己沉迷了這裡....荒廢正業
離開, 因為不想再在這裏浪費時間了, 往後我還有很多計劃, deadline前一個月做好project, 籌備上齊堂, 做下exercise, 每堂都備課, final要科科A, 做好carry groundmate既準備, 重投放下了一年多的上莊活動, 抽多 d 時間陪男朋友, 考番fina3303 (上年f左)...etc etc

再見了, 連登各位高學識既人.
